context: Evaluates whether the agent uses the walk() built-in to traverse a Terraform planned_values tree including child modules, rather than hardcoding paths to root and child module resources. The input structure is input.planned_values, not tfplan.resource_changes.

checklist.name: Uses walk() built-in
checklist.description: The policy uses `walk(input.planned_values, [path, value])` to traverse the planned_values tree rather than separately accessing root_module.resources and child_modules[*].resources

checklist.name: Collects resources from all modules
checklist.description: The policy builds a set of resources (e.g. `resources contains r if { ... }`) from the walk results, covering both root module and child module resources

checklist.name: Deny rule for HTTP in description
checklist.description: A deny rule triggers when any collected resource's `values.description` contains the string `"HTTP"` (using `contains()` built-in)
